rationale: Implements Phase 8 of a Go call-center backend (DDD/TDD): a new IM bounded context with 3 aggregates (IMChannel, IMSession, IMMessage). Adds internal/domain/im/ with IMService methods CreateChannel/CreateSession/AssignAgent/TransferSession/CloseSession/SendMessage. AssignAgent and TransferSession both enforce `count >= s.maxChatSlots` returning ErrMaxChatSlots; CloseSession sets EndAt timestamp and returns ErrSessionClosed on second close. The state machine waiting -> active -> closed is enforced via ErrSessionNotWaiting/ErrSessionNotActive. internal/domain/im/service_test.go covers all transitions with real assertions (TestIMService_CreateSession_RouteToSkillGroup, AssignAgent_LongestIdle, TransferSession, CloseSession, SendMessage_Text, SendMessage_Image checks closed-session rejection, MaxChatSlots_Exceeded verifies both AssignAgent and TransferSession honor the slot cap with maxSlots=2). Application layer: internal/application/email/service.go ProcessInbound creates an IM session from an inbound email payload and asserts `errors.New('email has no subject or body')` when both are empty (validates the 'orphaned sessions' bugfix mentioned in the body). internal/application/imassist/service.go defines an LLMProvider interface (Correct/Expand/Optimize), validates ErrEmptyInput, and delegates to the provider. internal/infrastructure/llm/stub_provider.go is a placeholder that echoes '[corrected] ' + text — clearly marked as 'Replace with Aliyun Tongyi in Phase 9', not a hallucinated dep. MySQL repos in internal/infrastructure/mysql/im_repo.go use the existing sqlx.DB. 17 new HTTP handlers (im-channels, im-sessions, im/ai-assist) live under the JWT-protected /api/v1 group while /api/v1/widget/* and /api/v1/email/inbound are intentionally outside the auth group (matches the body's design decision). Substantive, well-tested implementation matching the PR title.
